title: The future of food — новые слова

items.example: You should eat a variety of vegetables every day.
In some countries, people eat fried insects as a snack.
Lab-grown meat could be a sustainable alternative to traditional farming.
I prefer to buy organic fruit and vegetables.
Processed food often contains too much salt and sugar.
Genetically modified crops can resist pests and diseases.
Fishing must be sustainable to protect ocean life.
Good nutrition is essential for a healthy lifestyle.
Beans, lentils, and tofu are excellent sources of protein.
Some people avoid dairy because they are lactose intolerant.
A vegan diet excludes all animal products.
This drink contains artificial colours and flavours.
